pageContext.name: Book of Souls Tankard
pageContext.description: Show your allegiance to the Monsters of Rock with this electrifying and officially licensed Iron Maiden Book of Souls Tankard!  The zombie-like music icon emerges from the front and back of the tankard, staring forward with this piercing red eyes and intimidating all those that pass by. Surrounded by tribal symbols and skulls inspired by the artwork featured within the band's Book of Souls album.  Cast in high-quality resin and hand-painted, the tankard comes with removable stainless steel insert so you can spend less time cleaning and more time rocking!
